name: graph-rag-explorer
description: Expert Node Navigator and Architecture Explorer via RAG and Gemini

graphRagExplorer.EntitiesTypesList.description: List of predefined entity types for the graph exploration.

graphRagExplorer.regexFilterEnabled.description: Enable Regex matching in the filter bar by default.

graphRagExplorer.TreeFilterEnabled.description: Apply search filters on the Tree View by default.

graphRagExplorer.geminiApiKey.description: API Key for Gemini Assistant analysis.

graphRagExplorer.tooltipDelay.description: Delay in milliseconds before showing the custom tooltips on hover.

graphRagExplorer.pinFilesExporter.description: Automatically pin the Graph RAG Explorer UI tab when opened.

graphRagExplorer.graphLegendEnabled.description: Display the visual topological legend by default upon launch.

graphRagExplorer.callersDepth.description: Default callers upstream lookup relationship parsing depth.

graphRagExplorer.calleesDepth.description: Default callees downstream lookup relationship parsing depth.

graphRagExplorer.excludePathsRegex.description: Regex to exclude paths containing specific directories (e.g., node_modules, target, .git, dist, /\.[^/]+).

graphRagExplorer.forceScriptSync.description: Force synchronized recreation of local project core scripts.

graphRagExplorer.logFileMaxSize.description: Maximum size per log file before rotation triggers (in Megabytes).

graphRagExplorer.logFileMaxCountRetensio.description: Maximum number of historical log file nodes to keep before cycling.

graphRagExplorer.neo4j.version.description: The specific community release version of the local sandboxed database engine server.

graphRagExplorer.neo4j.uri.description: Neo4j connection endpoint mapping into the embedded jQAssistant server database.

graphRagExplorer.neo4j.password.description: Database secure transaction authorization secret credentials.

graphRagExplorer.jqassistant.version.description: The target production-ready release version of the portable jQAssistant CLI tool.

graphRagExplorer.jqassistant.downloadUrl.description: The absolute parameterized GitHub Releases download link for fetching portable jQAssistant distribution packages.

graphRagExplorer.jqassistant.xmlReportPa.description: Workspace matching path targeting local JaCoCo XML metric reports.

graphRagExplorer.dependencyCruiser.confi.description: Configuration rules path definition for Dependency Cruiser checks.

graphRagExplorer.graphify.arguments.description: Optional runtime execution flags passed onto the background python graphify engine.
